sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, value1 Array(UInt32), value2 Array(UInt32), name String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data WHERE name || ' Data' = 'Alice Data';
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(value1) > 1;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL AND name || ' Extra' LIKE 'Bob Extra';
WITH (SELECT SUM(id) FROM test_data) AS total_id SELECT total_id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) FROM test_data GROUP BY total_id;
CREATE TABLE test_data_null (id UInt32, value1 Array(UInt32) DEFAULT [NULL], value2 Array(UInt32) DEFAULT [NULL]) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data_null WHERE value1 || value2 = [2];
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data_null GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT() < 3;
SELECT id, bitmapToArray(bitmapXor(bitmapBuild(value1), bitmapBuild(value2))) AS res FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data_null WHERE value2 IS NOT NULL);
